_meta.description: Curated Freesound.org CC0 sound effects catalog for game UI / event SFX. Entries are metadata-only — consumers fetch the audio via Freesound's preview-CDN (no auth needed for HQ MP3 previews) using scripts/audio/fetch-sfx.mjs in this repo. Each slot represents a game event class; multiple entries per slot give the per-play variability that makes events feel less mechanical.
_meta.licenseModel: All entries are Creative Commons 0 (CC0) — public domain dedication. No attribution legally required, but `attribution` field is provided so consuming projects can credit authors in their docs if they choose.
usedBy: dstefl/lunarpowerpulse — 10 slots × variant pool, encoded to Opus 96 kbps stereo, layered with procedural fallbacks

click.intent: Building placement / UI confirmation tap. Fires often (every 5-10 s during active play) — multiple variants are essential to avoid mechanical repetition.

variants.title: Light Taps
variants.author: Squirrel_404
variants.note: Multi-tap recording. Extract a single tap (e.g. starting at 5.30s for 0.4s) for the slot.

pulse.intent: Cycle / metronome tick — extremely subtle, fires on every game-cycle boundary.

gapFill.suno: Subtle wood mechanical metronome tick, low warm thump, single short impact, no resonance, no tail, 80ms

overload.intent: Region power overload / system stress warning. Tense but not aggressive.

variants.title: Electric Failure — High Voltage Power Down
variants.author: ATP2-kh
variants.note: High-frequency electrical drone suggesting overload. Trim to 1.5s for game use.

variants.title: Tibetan singing bowl
variants.author: itinerantmonk108
variants.note: Long single bowl strike. Trim to a 4-5s usable section.

variants.title: Three Short Bell Rings
variants.author: el_boss
variants.note: Three discrete bell rings — split into 3 variants via silencedetect splitting (boundaries roughly at 3.5s, 6.1s).

goodEvent.intent: Positive in-game event toast. Bright, optimistic, brief.

badEvent.intent: Negative in-game event toast. Two intensities recommended (mild vs severe).

habitatCrack.intent: Habitat structural damage tick. Sharp, dry — like ice or wood cracking. Fires often when stress is high — rich variant pool (7+) recommended.

variants.title: Wood Crack 1
variants.author: utsuru
variants.note: Two distinct cracks in the recording — extract individually (split at ~0.94s).

variants.title: Pencil snap / twig
variants.author: kyles
variants.note: Three snaps — split via silencedetect (clear silences at ~0.4s, 2.0s, 4.2s).

habitatCollapse.intent: Habitat destruction (third crack). Low, descending, body-blow.

variants.title: Muffled Distant Explosion
variants.author: NenadSimic
variants.note: Direct-use. Pre-decayed, no pre-roll silence to trim.

variants.title: G43 Distant Explosions
variants.author: craigsmith
variants.note: Long compilation of 26+ explosions. Extract 2-3 individual instances (e.g. starting at 5.96s and 19.0s) for additional variants.

he3Shipment.intent: Cargo / resource shipment lift-off. Ascending whoosh with Doppler descent.

variants.title: Sci Fi Wooshes variations
variants.author: Alex_hears_things
variants.note: Multiple whoosh takes. Extract 3 individual swooshes (around 0s, 4.97s, 13.86s).

achievementUnlock.intent: Achievement unlocked / level complete fanfare. Triumphant but brief.

variants.title: Success Fanfare Brass
variants.author: FunWithSound
variants.note: Brass fanfare. Trim to first 3s for game use.
